features.name: labeled cover property statement in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a labeled cover property statement within an always_comb procedural block, where the cover condition can be statically evaluated

features.name: combinational output signal driving cover properties
features.description: Code should include a combinational output signal with a constant assignment that drives cover property evaluation

features.name: multiple formal properties in single procedural block
features.description: Code should include multiple cover property statements with labels in the same always_comb block that reference different bits of a signal
